meta.title: Messages
meta.description: One-to-one Q&A threads between buyers and sellers, scoped to a listing.

inbox.title: Messages
inbox.subtitle: Each thread is a private Q&A with a seller about one listing.
inbox.emptyDescription: Start a conversation from a listing page with the “Ask the seller” button.
inbox.emptyHint: Pre-purchase questions go fastest straight to the seller.

thread.empty: Send the first message to start the conversation.
thread.pollingNote: Checks for new messages every {{seconds}} seconds.
